epigraph: “The early morning has gold in its mouth.” — Franklin

messages.preview: Sorry I did not realise that some of you were still without power. We're at home all day if anyone needs anything XX
Yep, she somehow doesn’t look any different haha x
pls can you tell Esme Ferg moved drumming to 6 which is better as can eat after xx

tasks.text: Brian. Book meeting Prep for Caroline
Get testimonial quote from CEO of Parkinson's UK (on-on-one in two weeks).

weather.narrative: Drizzle through the morning, easing by afternoon. Take a coat for the school run.

body.trend: Up 4.3% on the prior week. Sleep ran 3h 24m overnight.
